channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Star Fox, Zelda: Ocarina of Time Switch 2 Leaks Are a 'Worst-Case Scenario' for Nintendo, Former Staff Say - IGN
item.description:
1. Star Fox, Zelda: Ocarina of Time Switch 2 Leaks Are a 'Worst-Case Scenario' for Nintendo, Former Staff Say  IGN
  2. New Zelda: Ocarina Of Time Release Officially Confirmed For May 21  IMDb
  3. Nintendo is "obviously" having a meltdown over Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake after proving Star Fox leaker right, says ex-marketing lead, since it’s "the company that banks on" surprise  Yahoo Tech
  4. Zelda: Ocarina of Time Remake Potentially Gets First Tease From Nintendo  comicbook.com
  5. Zelda: Ocarina Of Time 4K Remake Gameplay Blows Fans Away  ScreenRant

item.title: Why Xbox Just Removed Its Biggest Multiplayer Paywall - Geeky Gadgets
item.description:
1. Why Xbox Just Removed Its Biggest Multiplayer Paywall  Geeky Gadgets
  2. Did Microsoft just tease a new Xbox UI?  The Verge
  3. Official Xbox Dashboard Mockup Hints At Potential Changes Across Console, PC & Mobile  Pure Xbox
  4. Xbox slyly shows off what looks like a new UI for its ecosystem  Android Headlines
  5. Xbox Free UI Overhaul Finally Coming But You Won't Like It  GAMINGbible
